title: SunTraps
description: SunTrap is an innovative plugin for Minecraft 1.16.5 that adds unique and fully customizable traps that can bring any server to life!
body:
SunTrap is an innovative plugin for Minecraft 1.16.5 that adds unique and fully customizable traps that can bring any server to life!

## With SunTrap, you can:

- Create traps from scratch: customize the appearance of the trap, select its functions and make them truly unique to your world.
- Customize the design: change the textures, names and descriptions of objects so that the traps fit perfectly into the atmosphere of your server.
- Choose the abilities of the trap:
> Damage — set the power of the trap so that it becomes a real threat to the players.

> Hotbar Shuffle — Surprise the players by making them search for their tools in the shuffled inventory!

Traps are perfect for PvP arenas, traps and mini-games, adding new tactical possibilities and fun!

**Features:**
- Fully customizable trap settings.
- Easy installation and minimal resource requirements.

**Конфиг:**


```
#permissions: sunTrap.reload - Reload plugin, sunTrap.give - Give item
#author: @Im_Loper
messages:
  help: |
    &7Help for plugin:
    &7/trap give {item} {player} &7- &8Give item
    &7/trap reload &7- &8Reload plugin
  reload: '&6 | &7Plugin was rebooted in &f{ms} &7ms'
  give: '&6 | &7You have successfully issued &f{item}&7 to the player &f{player}'
  no-permissions: '&6 | &7You do not have permission'
  error-args: '&6 | &7For this command, you need &f{args}&7 arguments'
  player-offline: '&6 | &7Player &f{player}&7 is not online'
  trap-spawn: '&6 | &7Trap spawned'
traps:
  #You can add an unlimited number of traps
  trap-1:
    #If you want to put the material, then write the material,
    #if you want to put the head with basehead, then write base64-{tag}
    material: base64-eyJ0ZXh0dXJlcyI6eyJTS0lOIjp7InVybCI6Imh0dHA6Ly90ZXh0dXJlcy5taW5lY3JhZnQubmV0L3RleHR1cmUvZjM3YzcwODgyZjFiNTNiM2YxYWQzMDY3ZmE3ZDMyY2I4Y2NlZmJhN2ZkMmVkMWMxNWE1OGVkMmQ4MjZkYjg0NiJ9fX0=
    enchantment: true
    cooldown: 10
    damage: 15
    mix-hotbar: false
    displayName: '&8« &7Trap №1 &8»'
    lore:
      - '&7'
      - '&7 Damage: 15 '
      - '&7 '
  trap-2:
    material: base64-eyJ0ZXh0dXJlcyI6eyJTS0lOIjp7InVybCI6Imh0dHA6Ly90ZXh0dXJlcy5taW5lY3JhZnQubmV0L3RleHR1cmUvZjM3YzcwODgyZjFiNTNiM2YxYWQzMDY3ZmE3ZDMyY2I4Y2NlZmJhN2ZkMmVkMWMxNWE1OGVkMmQ4MjZkYjg0NiJ9fX0=
    enchantment: true
    cooldown: 10
    mix-hotbar: true
    damage: 20
    displayName: '&8« &7Trap №2 &8»'
    lore:
      - '&7'
      - '&7 Damage: 20'
      - '&7 Mix player hotbar'
      - '&7'
trap-locations: {}
```


Use SunTrap to add intrigue and unexpected surprises to the gameplay of your Minecraft server!
